description.value: A wrapper around the GitHub CLI (gh) with policy enforcement, rate-limit gating, and budget audit logging.  Every gh invocation routes through here: the subcommand is policy-checked, the call is gated against its rate-limit budget (via @bounded-systems/github-budget), and the …

keywords.value: GITHUB · GH · CLI-WRAPPER · POLICY · RATE-LIMIT · SEAM
